# REGIME READ — 2026-07-03

## Changes Since Previous Read
- **Stage: 3 → 3 (STAGE 3 SUSTAIN Day 3 held on VIX, but BEARISH BREADTH TRIGGER FIRED — regime under active test).** The Jul 2 read framed Stage 3 as "Day 2 sustain, VIX Day 3 sub-18 lock deepening, NFP Jul 3 08:30 ET binding resolution event T-minus 1 session, structural cushion eroded, one-sigma adverse path directly tests 200DMA." Overnight into Jul 3: **VIX crushes further to 15.98 (-1.05% Jul 3 intraday, Day 4 sub-18 lock with 0.98 pts from 15 Stage-2 trigger — very close)**, VXN modestly higher to 27.98 (+1.05% Jul 2 close), **Nasdaq Comp -5.0% touched the -5% threshold that formed one leg of the prior read's bearish trigger**, **NDX -1.61% Jul 2 estimated to break TQQQ 50DMA (est. TQQQ $73.55 vs 50DMA $76.39 = -3.7% BELOW) — the OTHER leg of the same bearish trigger**, **DJI vaulted to fresh 52W high +1.14% Jul 2**, **Gold +2.03% Jul 3 = decisive defensive flight-to-safety bid**, Brent fade stalls (-0.19% Jul 3), DXY -0.08% mild soft.
- **Total score: +1 → +1 (unchanged arithmetic, composition materially deteriorated).** Same total but underlying quality decisively split: dealer/sentiment strengthened further on VIX Day 4 sub-18 lock (0.98 pts from Stage-2 trigger); **breadth lens downgrades toward -2 on BOTH legs of the -1 trigger firing (Nasdaq Comp -5.0% + TQQQ likely below 50DMA)**; **cross-asset downgrades from +1 to 0 on Gold +2.03% defensive rotation + Brent fade stall**; geopolitical held +2. Composition change is regime-transition-signal: broad-market vol says "no crisis" but Nasdaq-mega-cap-tech-specific pricing says "rotation/de-rating in progress."
- **Triggers from previous read:**
  - **Bullish — VIX close below 15 for 2+ sessions (→ Stage 2):** **NOT FIRED, gap narrowed decisively to 0.98 pts** (from 1.54 Jul 2). VIX -1.05% Jul 3 intraday. **VERY CLOSING** — one more crush day and Stage-2 trigger fires on Day-1-sub-15. Directionally the closest it has been all cycle.
  - **Bullish — VXN close below 25 for 2+ sessions (→ Stage 2):** **NOT FIRED, gap widened to 2.98 pts** (from 2.69 Jul 2). VXN +1.05% Jul 2 = second consecutive backup day. Trigger moving AWAY, not closer. **VIX/VXN spread widens further to 12.00 pts (from 11.15 Jul 2 → 11.15 → 12.00) = mega-cap-concentration premium re-widening decisively over three sessions.**
  - **Bullish — SPX/NDX new relative highs:** **NOT FIRED, moved further away.** SPX unchanged at -1.8% below 52W high; NDX moved from -3.1% → -4.7% (widened 1.6 pts). **NDX -1.61% Jul 2 = extended profit-taking, not consolidation-then-reclaim.**
  - **Bullish — NFP Jul 3 in-line + no fresh policy shock:** **RESOLUTION TODAY 08:30 ET.** Snapshot Jul 3 data (VIX, DXY, Brent, Gold) reflects post-NFP intraday; equity Jul 3 data not yet in snapshot (Jul 3 = half-day close 13:00 ET). VIX behavior (-1.05% Jul 3) + DXY -0.08% + Gold +2.03% suggests **NFP delivered a market-friendly-but-defensive-rotation-favoring read** (VIX crush = no vol shock; Gold firm = risk-hedge bid persists; DXY soft = mild dovish tilt). Not a hot-surprise crush and not a cold-surprise recession-panic — **appears in-line-to-slightly-cool with rotation continuing**.
  - **Bearish — NFP Jul 3 hot surprise:** **NOT FIRED (VIX crush + Brent fade stall + Gold firm all point away from hot-hawkish print).**
  - **Bearish — VIX re-crosses above 20:** **NOT FIRED, gap WIDENED to 4.02 pts** (from 3.46 Jul 2). VIX moving decisively away from bearish trigger.
  - **Bearish — VXN re-tests 30:** **NOT FIRED, gap 2.02 pts** (from 2.31 Jul 2). VXN backed up +0.29 vs Jul 2 = narrowing 0.29 pts. Marginal drift toward bearish trigger, no test.
  - **Bearish — TQQQ below 50DMA $76.39 + Nasdaq Comp re-breaks -5% concurrent:** **BOTH LEGS FIRED (partial, needs broker confirm on TQQQ side).** Nasdaq Comp % vs 52W high at -5.0% = exactly at threshold (0.0 pts inside). TQQQ estimate $73.55 (3× reset from Jul 1 est. $77.28 × (1 + 3×(-0.0161))) = **-3.7% below 50DMA $76.39**. **Two-condition bearish trigger has fired on both sides — this is regime-transition-signal firing.** Caveat: TQQQ leg is 3× reset estimate not broker close — needs broker confirmation, but NDX -1.61% Jul 2 makes 50DMA-hold arithmetically implausible.
  - **Bearish — MOU walk-back / fresh geopolitical shock:** **NOT FIRED** (no incremental headlines in snapshot).
  - **Bearish — HY OAS through 300 bp:** **NOT REFRESHED** (data gap, Week 4).
- **Notable lens flips:** No arithmetic score changes — same +1 total. **Composition changes materially in three lenses:**
  1. **Breadth quality decisively deteriorated** — both legs of -1 trigger firing (Nasdaq Comp at threshold + TQQQ likely below 50DMA); held at -1 with the caveat that on broker confirm of TQQQ 50DMA breach, this warrants downgrade to -2 next read.
  2. **Cross-asset downgraded from +1 to 0** — Gold +2.03% Jul 3 = decisive defensive flight-to-safety bid returning; Brent fade stalls to -0.19% Jul 3 (was -1.65% Jul 2, -0.91% Jul 1). Cluster tips from "mild risk-on with defensive fade extending" → "mixed with defensive bid returning + growth-easing narrative losing conviction."
  3. **Dealer/sentiment strengthened further on VIX Day 4 sub-18 lock at 15.98** — 0.98 pts from Stage-2 trigger = closest all cycle. Bullish held at +1 (not upgraded because VXN backup persists + VIX/VXN spread widens = Nasdaq-concentration premium re-emerging = quality mixed).
- **Bonus flip — DJI made fresh 52W high +1.14% Jul 2 while NDX -1.61% same session.** This is the most consequential internal-composition signal in the read: **decisive intra-market rotation OUT of mega-cap tech INTO industrials/broad-market cyclicals**. Not captured in the top-line score (indices contribute to breadth), but it explains why VIX (SPX-weighted vol) crushes while VXN (NDX-weighted vol) backs up. **Reading: the NDX pullback is a rotation trade, NOT a broad-market de-risking event** — but that's exactly what makes it a Nasdaq-concentration-specific bearish trigger firing while broad-market says "regime constructive."

> **Snapshot mix:** Equity indices + VXN = **Jul 2 Thursday close** (post-ISM digest, NDX -1.61% extended profit-taking Day 2). VIX + DXY + Brent + Gold = **Jul 3 Friday intraday** (post-NFP 08:30 ET, pre-13:00 ET half-day close). Jul 3 equity close will refresh next read. 10Y last refreshed Jun 26 = **5 sessions stale**.
>
> **Headline signal #1 — VIX crushes to 15.98 (-1.05% Jul 3 intraday). Day 4 sub-18 lock deepens with 0.98 pts to Stage-2 trigger (closest all cycle).** VIX/VXN spread widens further to **12.00 pts** (from 11.15 Jul 2 → 12.00 Jul 3) — third consecutive session of broad-vs-Nasdaq-vol bifurcation widening. **Reading: NFP Jul 3 08:30 ET appears to have delivered a market-friendly print** (VIX would spike on hot-hawkish or cold-recession surprise; instead VIX -1.05% Jul 3 = crush continues). **Broad-market dealer positioning is at the deepest sub-18 lock in the cycle; the Nasdaq-concentration premium continues to widen decisively.** This is post-NFP price action favoring in-line-to-slightly-cool print with broad-market relief but Nasdaq-mega-cap specific de-rating persisting.
>
> **Headline signal #2 — DJI made fresh 52W high +1.14% Jul 2 while NDX -1.61% same session. This is the most consequential internal signal in the read.** Composition: SPX 0.00%, NDX -1.61%, Nasdaq Comp -0.80%, DJI +1.14%, RUT -0.55%. **Decisive rotation OUT of mega-cap tech INTO industrials/broad-market cyclicals.** Not defensive rotation (DJI +1.14% = risk-on industrials); not broad de-risking (SPX unchanged, RUT contained). Pattern: **NDX ≪ Nasdaq Comp ≪ SPX ≪ DJI = mega-cap tech de-rating with rotation into cyclicals**. Reading: this is EXACTLY what the widening VIX/VXN spread predicts — broad-market vol collapses (dealers see cyclical relief bid), Nasdaq-vol persists (mega-cap tech de-rating unresolved).
>
> **Headline signal #3 — BOTH legs of prior read's bearish trigger appear to have fired on Jul 2.** Nasdaq Comp % vs 52W high moved -4.2% → -5.0% = threshold touched (0.0 pts inside). TQQQ estimated $73.55 (3× NDX -1.61% reset from Jul 1 est. $77.28) = -3.7% below 50DMA $76.39. **Two-condition breadth trigger has fired on both sides — this is a regime-transition-signal firing.** Caveat: TQQQ leg is 3× reset estimate not broker close; NDX -1.61% Jul 2 makes 50DMA hold arithmetically implausible (would require intra-day pattern where TQQQ decoupled from NDX 3× reset, which does not typically occur intraday for a leveraged ETF). **Broker confirm of TQQQ Jul 2 close is highest-priority open item.**
>
> **Headline signal #4 — Gold +2.03% Jul 3 = decisive defensive flight-to-safety bid returning + Brent fade stalls.** Brent Jul 3 -0.19% (from -1.65% Jul 2, -0.91% Jul 1) = **fade momentum decisively lost**. Gold +2.03% Jul 3 (from +0.37% Jul 2, ~flat Jul 1) = **defensive bid accelerating**. Cluster tips from "mild risk-on with defensive fade" → **"defensive bid returning while growth-easing narrative loses conviction."** DXY -0.08% mild soft = mild dovish tilt but marginal. Cross-asset now sends mixed signal: broad-market VIX says relief, Gold + Nasdaq de-rating say risk-hedge demand persists.
>
> **What's changed vs Jul 2:** VIX Day 4 sub-18 lock deepens decisively (0.98 pts to Stage-2 trigger, closest all cycle) — bullish signal strengthening; VXN Day 3 sub-28 held but +1.05% backup + VIX/VXN spread widening to 12.00 pts = Nasdaq-concentration premium re-widening; **Nasdaq Comp -5% + TQQQ 50DMA (est.) = bearish breadth trigger both-leg firing**; DJI 52W-high + NDX pullback = decisive rotation; Gold defensive bid + Brent fade stall = cross-asset downgrade from +1 to 0. **Net: composition materially deteriorated on Nasdaq-specific structural signals despite VIX Day 4 sub-18 broad-market strength. Regime under active test.**

## Regime Stage Tracker
- **Current Stage: 3 — Neutral/choppy (VIX 15-22, range-bound). SUSTAIN DAY 3, but ACTIVELY TESTED.** VIX 15.98 sits deep inside Stage 3 range with 0.98 pts from Stage-2 trigger and 4.02 pts margin to 22 bearish. VXN 27.98 sits at Stage 3 upper zone. **Bearish breadth trigger has fired on both legs (Nasdaq Comp -5.0% + TQQQ ~-3.7% below 50DMA)** — under normal conditions this would signal Stage 4 re-entry. Not downgraded to Stage 4 in this read because: (a) VIX broad-market says "no crisis" with Day 4 sub-18 lock deepening, (b) DJI made 52W high same session = decisive intra-market rotation not broad de-risking, (c) NFP Jul 3 08:30 ET intraday price action (VIX crush + Gold firm + Brent stall) suggests market-friendly-with-rotation print not hot-hawkish or cold-recession shock, (d) TQQQ 50DMA leg needs broker confirmation. **However this is a Stage 3 with an actively firing Stage-4 breadth signal — held provisionally on VIX regime persistence pending broker confirm and Jul 6 gap open.**
- **Stage Anchor:** Jul 1, 2026 — VXN sub-28 FIRED, VIX Day 2 sub-18 locked, Nasdaq Comp buffer restored (subsequently touched -5% Jul 2), quarter-end orderly. Stage 3 = Day 3 of sustain with breadth trigger firing on Jul 2.
- **Position:** Stage 3 Day 3 into Jul 3 half-day close + Jul 4 weekend + Jul 6 gap-open sequence. **NFP resolution Jul 3 08:30 ET has already released** (intraday snapshot data reflects post-NFP price action). **Mon Jul 6 gap-open is the next regime-confirmation event** — if Jul 3 close continues Jul 2's rotation pattern (DJI up, NDX flat/soft) and Mon Jul 6 sustains, that's rotation-not-regime-break; if Jul 6 opens gap-down on NDX with VIX bouncing above 18 = Stage 4 re-entry confirmation. Base case Stage 3 sustain with rotation: 45%; Stage 4 re-entry: 30% (elevated from Jul 2's 25% on breadth trigger firing); extended Stage 3 churn: 25%; Stage 5 tail: ~5% (unchanged).
- **Confidence: Low (downgraded from Medium held Jul 2).** Why Low (not Medium): (a) **Bearish breadth trigger has fired both-leg on Jul 2** — this is the exact regime-transition-signal the prior read watched for; VIX broad-market divergence keeps it Stage 3 held for now but composition is regime-transition; (b) **VIX/VXN spread widens to 12.00 pts (from 11.15 Jul 2)** = broad-vs-Nasdaq bifurcation widening decisively for three consecutive sessions; (c) **TQQQ 50DMA breach unconfirmed** — 3× reset estimate not broker close; broker confirm is highest-priority open item; (d) **DJI 52W-high + NDX -1.61% rotation** is a decisive intra-market signal that could resolve either way (rotation-continuation = Stage 3 sustains; rotation-becomes-broad-de-risking = Stage 4); (e) **Gold +2.03% Jul 3 defensive bid returning** = cross-asset internal divergence; (f) Data cadence lagging — 10Y stale 5 sessions, positioning lens data gap Week 4, F&G Jun 17. Not Very-Low because: (1) VIX Day 4 sub-18 lock deepening = broad-market regime intact; (2) NFP Jul 3 intraday price action suggests market-friendly print; (3) No reversal signals fired on VIX or macro; (4) DJI 52W-high signals rotation not broad de-risking; (5) Structural floor at $68 200DMA + 4-wk low still exists.
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 2 mild-bullish/grind):** VIX daily close below 15 for 2+ sessions (currently 15.98, **0.98 pts away — closest all cycle**) AND VXN close below 25 for 2+ sessions (currently 27.98, 2.98 pts away — moved further Jul 2) AND SPX/NDX new relative highs (moved further from highs Jul 2) AND **rotation-continues without becoming broad de-risking on Jul 6 gap-open**. Timeframe: Jul 6-10 confirmation window.
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 4 re-entry):** **Broker confirms TQQQ Jul 2 close below 50DMA $76.39 (both legs of trigger fully fired) AND Nasdaq Comp -5.0% sustains through Jul 3-6** OR VIX re-crosses above 18 (2.02 pts away — reversible on Jul 6 gap-down) OR VIX re-crosses above 20 (4.02 pts away) OR VXN re-tests 30 (2.02 pts away — narrowed +0.29 Jul 2) OR **Jul 6 gap-open on NDX below -2% with rotation-breaks-broad-de-risking** OR MOU walk-back / geopolitical shock OR HY OAS through 300 bp on refresh.

## Regime Verdict
US risk environment **holds Stage 3 provisionally into Jul 6 gap-open with Low confidence** — VIX Day 4 sub-18 lock deepens to 15.98 (0.98 pts from Stage-2 trigger, closest all cycle), NFP Jul 3 intraday price action suggests market-friendly print (VIX crush + Brent stall + Gold firm = in-line-to-slightly-cool), DJI made fresh 52W high +1.14% Jul 2 signaling rotation OUT of mega-cap tech INTO industrials — but **bearish breadth trigger has fired on both legs (Nasdaq Comp -5.0% touched + TQQQ ~-3.7% below 50DMA on 3× reset estimate)**, VIX/VXN spread widens to 12.00 pts (mega-cap-concentration premium re-widening three consecutive sessions), Gold +2.03% Jul 3 defensive bid returning. Total score +1 unchanged arithmetically but composition materially deteriorated. **Mon Jul 6 gap-open is next binding confirmation event; broker confirm of TQQQ 50DMA breach is highest-priority open item.**

## Diverging Signals
- **THE DOMINANT JUL 3 TENSION: bearish breadth trigger firing on both legs while VIX Day 4 sub-18 lock deepens.** Nasdaq Comp -5.0% + TQQQ likely below 50DMA = under normal conditions this signals Stage 4 re-entry; VIX 15.98 (0.98 pts from Stage-2 trigger) says the opposite. **This is a regime-transition-signal firing on Nasdaq-mega-cap-specific pricing while broad-market vol says no crisis.** Interpretation: **rotation trade with mega-cap tech de-rating in isolation, not broad-market risk-off**. Confirmed by DJI +1.14% new 52W high same session as NDX -1.61%.
- **DJI made fresh 52W high +1.14% Jul 2 while NDX -1.61% + Nasdaq Comp -0.80% same session.** This is the most consequential internal signal. **Composition: NDX ≪ Nasdaq Comp ≪ RUT ≪ SPX ≪ DJI = decisive rotation OUT of mega-cap tech INTO industrials/broad-market cyclicals.** Not defensive rotation (DJI +1.14% is risk-on industrials); not broad de-risking (SPX unchanged, RUT contained). This EXPLAINS the widening VIX/VXN spread: dealers see cyclical relief; mega-cap-specific de-rating persists.
- **VIX/VXN spread widened to 12.00 pts (from 10.42 Jul 1 → 11.15 Jul 2 → 12.00 Jul 3).** Three-consecutive-session decisive widening. Broad-market vol collapses; Nasdaq-concentration premium re-emerges. Reading: this is the signature of **rotation-driven de-rating in Nasdaq-heavy names, not systemic risk-off**.
- **Gold +2.03% Jul 3 defensive bid returning while Brent fade decisively stalls (-0.19% Jul 3 from -1.65% Jul 2).** Cross-asset internal tension: growth-easing (Brent) narrative losing conviction, hedge demand (Gold) accelerating. **Net: cross-asset shifts from "risk-on with defensive fade" → "mixed with defensive bid returning."** Not a regime-break signal in isolation; combined with Nasdaq breadth-trigger firing = **compound signal of mid-cycle bifurcation**.
- **Bullish trigger #1 (VIX sub-15) closest all cycle at 0.98 pts while bullish trigger #2 (VXN sub-25) moved further to 2.98 pts** — split direction across dealer-flow trigger set decisively deepening. Broad-market vol has 0.98 pts of work to Stage-2 trigger; Nasdaq-vol has 2.98 pts against a +0.29 Jul 2 headwind. **Nasdaq-vol is the binding gate to Stage 2 and moving in wrong direction; broad-market vol is one crush-day from Stage-2 trigger fire.**
- **NFP Jul 3 08:30 ET intraday price action (VIX crush + Brent stall + Gold firm) suggests market-friendly print with rotation.** Not a hot-surprise crush signal (VIX would spike); not a cold-recession-panic signal (VIX would spike + Gold would spike much more sharply on hard-landing bid). VIX -1.05% + Gold +2.03% = **in-line-to-slightly-cool with rotation-into-defensive-and-industrials continuing**. This is the closest historical analog to a Fed-pivot-friendly-but-tech-de-rating pattern. Needs Jul 3 close + Mon Jul 6 gap-open to confirm.
- **Positioning + macro data gap deepening.** 10Y last refreshed Jun 26 = 5 sessions stale. F&G stale Jun 17 = Week 4. NAAIM/COT/AAII data gap Week 4. If yields quietly moved on NFP Jul 3 (unretrieved), macro score could shift materially on refresh. Flag: NFP Jul 3 will inevitably refresh macro read.

> EM math: $73.55 × est. IV (~84%) × 0.141 ≈ ±$8.71 ≈ ±11.8%. **Lower bound $64.85 sits $3.24 BELOW 200DMA $68.09 and $3.23 BELOW 4-wk low $68.08.** Upper bound $82.26 falls $5.83 short of 4-wk high $88.09. **Reading: EM band's downside now DIRECTLY BREAKS 200DMA + 4-wk low structural floor by ~$3.24 at one sigma. The Jul 2 read's "precisely tests" scenario has materialized-and-extended: Jul 2 pullback erased the last of the structural buffer and pushed the one-sigma adverse path INSIDE the 200DMA cluster.** Path-risk through Mon Jul 6 gap-open is materially amplified: even a routine adverse session directly tests 200DMA.
